title: W6/AO8: validator refuses write-granting sandbox modes on advice-class cli slots; repo config migrated to promptVia:stdin
action: Per AO8 (the advisor runs read-only, like every review-class slot) and plan.md 2B W6 remainder: (1) extend validateModelsConfig in skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/state.mjs so an ADVICE-CLASS cli slot (advisor and review, every runtime) whose command carries a known write-granting sandbox token is refused with a new problem code (e.g. cli-advice-slot-writable). Token blocklist: '-s workspace-write', '--sandbox workspace-write' (and the '=' spelling), 'danger-full-access' — match the existing B6/B7 blocklist style and its honest framing (known-bad tokens, NOT a positive read-only guarantee — say so in the message; do NOT claim it guarantees read-only). Generation/extraction cli slots are NOT advice-class and keep today's behavior. Keep the validator pure and throw-free on malformed input. (2) Extend scripts/test_config_validate.mjs (the validator's real behavioral suite, 21 rows, imports validateModelsConfig at :9 — NOT test_lib.mjs, which only census-checks the export name; panel BLOCKER-1): rows = advisor + '-s workspace-write' refused with cli-advice-slot-writable; review + workspace-write refused; generation + workspace-write NOT refused by the new code (workspace-write is the UNIQUE discriminator of the new path — panel W3); advisor + danger-full-access reports BOTH cli-unsafe-flag (universal blocklist, state.mjs:245-246) and the new advice-class code; clean '-s read-only' advisor passes; malformed shapes still no-throw. (3) Migrate this repo's .bee/config.json: add promptVia:"stdin" to models.claude.advisor and models.codex.review; AND append 'node scripts/test_config_validate.mjs' to commands.verify in the same config edit — the suite is currently orphaned from the baseline (panel BLOCKER-1, the Slice-0 'nothing runs it' class); add it only on a green tree, ao-0b law. Then node .bee/bin/bee.mjs config validate --json must end ok:true, problem_count 0 (exits 1 on problems — the chain bites). promptVia is a validation-time DECLARATION (B2); do not claim anywhere that it changes runtime transport — dispatch hardcodes stdin (panel W4). Mirror .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs byte-identical. FINAL STEP: node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --write, then full verify — --check green.

truths: an advisor or review cli slot with a workspace-write sandbox token is refused with cli-advice-slot-writable; a generation cli slot with the same token is untouched by the new code (unique discriminator)
danger-full-access on an advice slot reports both the universal unsafe-flag code and the new advice-class code
the refusal message names the token and states the blocklist is not a positive read-only guarantee
scripts/test_config_validate.mjs carries the new rows AND joins commands.verify (green tree first)
bee config validate on this repo ends ok:true with 0 problems
no text claims promptVia changes runtime transport (declaration only, B2)
validator never throws on malformed input (existing 21 rows stay green)
artifacts: verify chain output green including scripts/test_config_validate.mjs and config validate ok:true
prohibitions: no positive read-only claim in any message (blocklist honesty, B6/B7 framing)
no claim that promptVia affects runtime transport
no change to non-advice slots' validation
no edits outside the bounded files (release-manifest.json only via release_manifest.mjs --write)

verify: node scripts/test_config_validate.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs config validate --json && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check

trace.outcome: Extended validateModelsConfig (skills/bee-hive/templates/lib/state.mjs) with a new ADVICE_CLASS_WRITABLE_TOKENS blocklist ('-s workspace-write', '--sandbox workspace-write', '--sandbox=workspace-write', bare 'danger-full-access') that refuses code cli-advice-slot-writable on advisor/review cli slots only (AO8); generation/extraction untouched. Mirrored byte-identical to .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs. Added 8 rows to scripts/test_config_validate.mjs covering the new blocklist (per-token loop, review slot, generation non-discrimination W3, dual-code danger-full-access row, clean read-only pass). Migrated .bee/config.json: added promptVia:stdin to models.claude.advisor and models.codex.review, and joined scripts/test_config_validate.mjs into commands.verify (added only after confirming a green tree, ao-0b law). bee config validate --json now ends ok:true, 0 problems. Regenerated release-manifest.json via --write. Deviation: also updated skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs's EXPECTED_STATE_EXPORTS allowlist (outside the cell's bounded files) to add the two new exports ADVICE_CLASS_SLOTS/ADVICE_CLASS_WRITABLE_TOKENS — a blocking mechanical consequence (deviation rule 3): the exact-set export census test failed the moment the new exports existed, with no design choice involved.
trace.verify_output: test_config_validate.mjs 32/32 passed (incl. new advice-class rows); test_lib.mjs 342/342 passed (export census updated); test_lib_mirror.mjs all PASS (state.mjs mirror byte-identical); test_model_guard.mjs ALL PASS; bee config validate --json -> {ok:true, problem_count:0, problems:[]}; release_manifest --check -> 142 file(s) match stored manifest. Full recorded commands.verify chain (now including the newly-joined test_config_validate.mjs) also run end-to-end: exit 0.
trace.verify_command: node scripts/test_config_validate.mjs && node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs && node scripts/test_lib_mirror.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs && node .bee/bin/bee.mjs config validate --json && node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check
